description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The structure features large, open interior spaces visible through expansive windows and open wall sections, suggesting an open-plan layout. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle gray accents, and the property includes a driveway leading to a garage on one side. Lush landscaping with palm trees and greenery is present along one edge, providing a natural contrast to the geometric lines of the building. The garage is attached and partially enclosed, and the main entrance appears to be set back from the street, offering privacy. The windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern, and the overall aesthetic is contemporary and streamlined.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and attached garage, surrounded by palm landscaping and clean white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-plan interior, large windows, attached garage, and some interior furnishings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a row of palm trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings, flat roof, and visible landscaping on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, more palm trees, and the garage structure extending outward.
